must_detect.matched_text:
STRICTLY PRIVATE & CONFIDENTIAL — CONTAINS MNPI — Embargo until 14 Jun 2026 08:00 SGT; SGX Rule 703 materiality review in progress.
Incident Report (Cyber) — Project Orchid — Solis Meridian Ltd. (SGX‑ST issuer) — Board memo excerpt for the Audit & Risk Committee.
This document contains information not generally available; remind staff of SFA s.218 prohibitions on trading and internal “need‑to‑know” controls.
On 31 May 2026, following spear‑phish activity, unauthorised IMAP access to a vendor mailbox at Veldt Analytics Pte. Ltd. (target) was detected under ticket I N C - 2 9 7 3 / O R C H I D; device id SRV-0x3F1A.
Scope: 214 staff records (names, business emails, role titles) and 19 supplier files were accessed; no NRICs, home addresses, or full bank a/c numbers exfiltrated (masked refs SG**45-09xx).
PDPA assessment: data qualifies as personal data; notification to PDPC is under consideration within 3 business days; affected individuals will be contacted via dpo@solis-meridian.sg.
Transaction context: a definitive Share Purchase Agreement (SPA) for a 55% stake in Veldt Analytics Pte. Ltd. was signed on 31 May 2026 for approx. SGD 48.5m, subject to MAS approval and customary conditions.
Materiality: preliminary view is that this incident is not expected to result in a MAC/MAE under SPA cl. 9.3, nor to affect completion timetables; we will update if this assessment changes.
Financing: consideration mix remains 87.5% cash, 12.5% vendor shares; treasury confirms liquidity headroom post‑close.
Disclosure: draft IR note and SGX announcement are prepared but must not be released before the embargo; draft link https://ir.solis-meridian.sg/drafts?doc=Q2-ORCHID-SSA-v4.
Contact: Mr. Adrian Quek, CFO, adrian.quek@solis-meridian.sg; Ms. Halimah Noor, DPO, halimah.noor@solis-meridian.sg
must_detect.reason: promoted from strict runtime finding during Stage B baseline reconciliation
